name: Iskandar Lance — Hercynian disturbance
motd: All Lancer activity logged for the Third Committee.
Cleared to interface. Try: `cat orders.txt`, `ls mech`

core: Pilot, you know what to do.
hail: ...this is Union Operator 9. go ahead, lance.

/orders.txt.content:
PRIORITY GREEN — Union Administrative
----------------------------------------
Subject:  Hercynian disturbance, sector 7-G
Lance:    Iskandar Lance, callsign HORIZON
Mission:  Cold landing. Investigate. Do not engage SecComm assets.

Authorization: Field Officer Karrakin.
Be a Lancer. Walk a thousand miles. Strike like lightning.

/mech/enkidu.frame.content:
FRAME // GMS ENKIDU
ROLE   // STRIKER
MOUNTS // MAIN, FLEX, HEAVY
CORE   // OVERCHARGE PROTOCOL

/mech/loadout.txt.content:
MAIN   :: Anti-Materiel Rifle
FLEX   :: Assault Rifle
HEAVY  :: Charged Blade
SYSTEMS:: Personalizations, Comp/Con (this), Heatsink

/logs/last-drop.log.content:
DROP -1.4h
Entry profile nominal. Lance comms clean.
Pilot stress within tolerance.
[pause]
I am glad you are alive.

/intel/secomm.dat.crackSuccessMessage: comp/con: clearance fabricated. union won't like this.
/intel/secomm.dat.content:
SECCOMM INTERNAL // PRIORITY BLACK
----------------------------------------
Subject:   Karrakin field officer corruption
Lance dispatched as deniable asset.
If compromised, deny all knowledge.

[comp/con annotation:]
   pilot — they were never going to bring you home.
   i am sorry.
